user_message: Can you help me investigate the decline? The customer (Adatum Corporation) is asking about competitive positioning.

From: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-16 09:10 EST
Subject: Re: competitive positioning Discussion - Next Steps

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about competitive positioning. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
Date: 2024-02-19 11:54 EST
Subject: competitive positioning - Action Required

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about competitive positioning. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-23 10:10 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Adatum Corporation competitive positioning

Just checking in on the competitive positioning proposal. Our Infrastructure Manager is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

Meeting: competitive positioning Discussion - Adatum Corporation
Date: 2024-01-03
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation), Raj Mehta (Microsoft), David (Adatum Corporation)

[00:02:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on competitive positioning from our last session.

[00:07:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about performance requirements. Can we address those?

[00:09:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is data residency.

[00:13:00] David (Adatum Corporation): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about partner engagement. Can we address those?

[00:16:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): On the competitive positioning front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around data residency.

[00:18:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): The timeline for stakeholder alignment is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:22:00] David (Adatum Corporation): The timeline for timeline constraints is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:24:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on technical validation and found that the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around.

[00:26:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): Let me add some context -- we've been working on resource allocation and found that the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades.

[00:28:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is integration complexity.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Adatum Corporation: the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades

Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
